- b ≈ 1.04519 (per year)

So the fitted growth curve is:
p(t) ≈ 35,760 · (1.04519)^t

Equivalent per-decade form:
p(d) ≈ 35,760 · (1.556)^{d}, where d = t/10 is decades since 1790.
